content.speakerText: I just completed my registration. What should I do next to make sure everything is official?
content.speakerTextCn: 我刚完成注册，接下来该做什么才能确保一切正式生效？
expectedAnswers: I’ll check my email for the confirmation and log into the portal to verify my status is ‘Registered’.
I’ll download and save the receipt and screenshot the confirmation page — just in case.
I need to confirm both the email and the portal update, and I’ll print the receipt before the link expires.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否覆盖确认、保存、打印等关键动作
语言准确性：使用完成时、将来时正确，无结构错误
表达自然度：使用 'just in case', 'before the link expires' 等地道表达
